name: 影分身消散
description: 影分身死亡时，击杀者失去1充能点
skillCode: var clone = context.rulePiece; if (!clone) return { success: false, message: '' }; if (!context.sourcePiece || context.sourcePiece.instanceId !== clone.instanceId) return { success: false, message: '' }; var attacker = context.targetPiece; if (!attacker) return { success: true, message: clone.name + '消散（非战斗）' }; var attackerPlayer = battle.players.find(function(p) { return p.playerId === attacker.ownerPlayerId; }); if (attackerPlayer && attackerPlayer.chargePoints > 0) { attackerPlayer.chargePoints -= 1; } return { success: true, message: attacker.name + '击杀了影分身，失去1充能点' };
